items.title: Novatek reports significant production growth
items.body: The company posted very strong quarterly growth and improved export margins.

items.title: Novatek warns of logistics risk in Q3
items.body: Management said there is a noticeable risk of supply delays, but no major losses expected.

items.title: Megafon launches new B2B digital platform
items.body: The operator announced a neutral market expansion plan and partnership roadmap.

items.title: Alfa-Bank reports temporary profit decline
items.body: Quarterly results showed decline in net profit and higher cost of risk.

items.title: Alfa-Bank says capital position remains stable
items.body: The bank does not expect a crisis and sees moderate recovery in the second half.

items.title: Ozon reaches record order volume
items.body: Analysts call the result a very positive signal for revenue growth.

items.title: Ozon suffers warehouse disruption
items.body: A regional incident caused shipment delays and potential short-term losses.

items.title: MTS improves operating margin
items.body: The company reported better than expected profitability and stable cash flow.

items.title: MTS denies rumors about major losses
items.body: Management said there are no significant losses and no severe liquidity problems.

items.title: Severstal maintenance impacts output
items.body: Planned maintenance led to partial output decline, while annual guidance is unchanged.

items.title: Severstal signs new supply contracts
items.body: The contracts support stable demand and moderate growth next quarter.

items.title: Globaltrans comments on positive freight outlook
items.body: The company expects a stable market and does not see a sharp decline in demand.
